ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "hotel_category" TEXT /* Category of the hotel (e.g., 2 Star, 3 Star, 4 Star) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hotel is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the hotel is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the hotel */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the hotel */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the hotel */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Main contact number for the hotel */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the hotel's website */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* JSON array of facilities available at the hotel */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array of amenities available in the rooms */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the hotel */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Standard check-in time */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Standard check-out time */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel where the room is located */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of the room (e.g., Single, Double, Suite) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per night for the room */,
  "availability_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the room is currently available (true/false) */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests allowed in the room */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array of specific amenities available in the room */,
  "view" TEXT /* View from the room (e.g., city, sea, mountain) */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the room */,
  "last_cleaned" TEXT /* Date when the room was last cleaned */,
  "smoking" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the room is a smoking room */,
  "accessibility" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the room is accessible for guests with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room being reserved */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the reservation */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest making the reservation */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the reservation */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the reservation */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests included in the reservation */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid, partial) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the reservation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation was created */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests made by the guest (e.g., extra bed, late check-out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "loyalty_member" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the guest is a member of the loyalty program (true/false) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the guest */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the guest */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the guest */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON array of guest preferences (e.g., room type, amenities) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points the guest has accumulated */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Date of the guest's last visit to any hotel in the chain */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits the guest has made to any hotel in the chain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)
